# Daily Autodigital Shelf Full Context

## Description

A quiet system that makes a new sellable pack every day.

The shelf is generated by deterministic local Python automation and published as static files. It creates reusable printable worksheet packs, catalog metadata, policy pages, feeds, and ZIP archives.

## Monetization Boundary

- Monetization destination: support at https://gift.calmsprout.com
- Current public support page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/support.html
- Pay what you can bundle page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/pay-what-you-can.html
- Pricing page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/pricing.html
- Sponsor page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/sponsor.html
- Commercial use page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/commercial-use.html
- Sponsor Kit JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/sponsor-kit.json
- Support card SVG: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/assets/support-card.svg
- Daily Offer page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/daily-offer.html
- Daily Offer JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/daily-offer.json
- Support Signal report: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/support-signal.html
- Support Signal JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/support-signal.json
- Checkout Readiness report: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/checkout-readiness.html
- Checkout Readiness JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/checkout-readiness.json
- Revenue Proof report: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/revenue-proof.html
- Revenue Proof JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/revenue-proof.json
- Small Business Ops bundle page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/bundles/small-business-ops-collection.html
- Branded latest product: https://www.calmsprout.com/daily-shelf/products/2026-06-13-focus-menu
- Branded product support page: https://www.calmsprout.com/daily-shelf/products/2026-06-13-focus-menu/support
- Branded support intent redirect: https://www.calmsprout.com/daily-shelf/products/2026-06-13-focus-menu/support/go
- Product checkout is not connected unless `store_connected` is true in status.json.
- Revenue is not guaranteed or claimed by the site.

## Generated Packs

- [Focus Menu Builder](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-06-13-focus-menu/) - A menu of low, medium, and high energy task options for days when planning from scratch is too expensive. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-13-focus-menu.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-13-focus-menu.zip
- [Store Import Prep Sheet](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-06-12-store-import-prep/) - A worksheet for gathering product title, description, price hint, tags, and delivery files before using a store platform. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-12-store-import-prep.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-12-store-import-prep.zip
- [Two-Hour Workblock Planner](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-06-11-two-hour-workblock/) - A compact planning sheet for choosing one outcome, one timer, and one shutdown note. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-11-two-hour-workblock.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-11-two-hour-workblock.zip
- [Simple Order Form Draft](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-06-10-simple-order-form/) - A draft sheet for designing a small order or request form before building it online. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-10-simple-order-form.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-10-simple-order-form.zip
- [Daily Proof Log](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-06-09-daily-proof-log/) - A receipt-style log for recording visible proof of work without overexplaining the whole day. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-09-daily-proof-log.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-09-daily-proof-log.zip
- [Project Rescue Map](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-06-08-project-rescue-map/) - A one-page map for rescuing a messy project by separating assets, blockers, risks, and next moves. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-08-project-rescue-map.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-08-project-rescue-map.zip
- [Email Triage Sprint](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-06-07-email-triage/) - A 15-minute inbox worksheet for finding the few messages that actually need action. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-07-email-triage.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-07-email-triage.zip
- [Decision Parking Lot](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-06-06-decision-parking-lot/) - A worksheet for parking unresolved decisions so they stop interrupting the current task. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-06-decision-parking-lot.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-06-decision-parking-lot.zip
- [Tiny Launch Checklist](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-06-05-tiny-launch-checklist/) - A compact launch checklist for publishing a small page, pack, or offer without waiting for perfect. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-05-tiny-launch-checklist.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-05-tiny-launch-checklist.zip
- [Micro Offer Pricing Sheet](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-06-04-micro-offer-pricing/) - A simple worksheet for pricing a small digital or service offer without pretending the market is guaranteed. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-04-micro-offer-pricing.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-04-micro-offer-pricing.zip
- [Weekly Reset Board](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-06-03-weekly-reset/) - A printable reset board for tasks, bills, errands, and loose ends that need one weekly review. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-03-weekly-reset.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-03-weekly-reset.zip
- [One-Page SOP Builder](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-06-02-one-page-sop/) - A worksheet for documenting one repeatable task so someone else can follow it. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-02-one-page-sop.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-02-one-page-sop.zip
- [Listing Photo Checklist](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-06-01-listing-photo-checklist/) - A practical shot list for creating clearer marketplace, rental, or product listing photos. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-01-listing-photo-checklist.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-01-listing-photo-checklist.zip
- [Client Intake Lite](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-31-client-intake-lite/) - A small intake sheet for turning a vague request into scope, timeline, budget, and next action. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-31-client-intake-lite.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-31-client-intake-lite.zip
- [Appointment Prep Card](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-30-appointment-prep/) - A one-page prep card for collecting questions, documents, and follow-up notes before an appointment. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-30-appointment-prep.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-30-appointment-prep.zip
- [Downloads Folder Reset](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-29-download-folder-reset/) - A 20-minute digital cleanup worksheet for turning a downloads pile into decisions. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-29-download-folder-reset.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-29-download-folder-reset.zip
- [Invoice Follow-Up Mini Kit](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-28-invoice-followup/) - A calm worksheet for tracking unpaid invoices and writing one clear follow-up. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-28-invoice-followup.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-28-invoice-followup.zip
- [Simple Content Calendar](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-27-simple-content-calendar/) - A low-pressure one-week content planner for small brands, creators, and solo operators. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-27-simple-content-calendar.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-27-simple-content-calendar.zip
- [Subscription Audit Sheet](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-26-subscription-audit/) - A quick worksheet for finding recurring charges, renewal dates, and pause candidates. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-26-subscription-audit.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-26-subscription-audit.zip
- [Honest Follow-Up Draft Kit](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-25-offer-followup/) - A non-spam template sheet for following up with one real person or lead. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-25-offer-followup.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-25-offer-followup.zip
- [Digital Declutter Sprint](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-24-digital-declutter/) - A focused cleanup sheet for one folder, inbox, download pile, or project archive. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-24-digital-declutter.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-24-digital-declutter.zip
- [Micro Budget Reset](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-23-micro-budget/) - A one-page reset for seeing near-term bills, small leaks, and the next cash decision. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-23-micro-budget.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-23-micro-budget.zip
- [Tiny Home Inventory Pack](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-22-home-inventory/) - A room-by-room mini inventory for renters, homeowners, resellers, and insurance prep. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-22-home-inventory.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-22-home-inventory.zip
- [Low-Energy Week Planner](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-21-low-energy-week/) - A gentle planning sheet for weeks where consistency matters more than intensity. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-21-low-energy-week.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-21-low-energy-week.zip
- [Receipt Runner Ledger Pack](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-20-receipt-runner/) - A simple ledger and daily receipt habit for tiny projects that need proof of movement. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-20-receipt-runner.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-20-receipt-runner.zip
- [Calm Launch One-Page Kit](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-19-calm-launch/) - A printable page for turning one messy idea into one offer, one audience, and one next action. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-19-calm-launch.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-19-calm-launch.zip
- [Landing Page Copy Blocks](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-18-landing-page-copy/) - A fill-in worksheet for headline, promise, proof, offer, and next action copy. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-18-landing-page-copy.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-18-landing-page-copy.zip
- [Renewal Reminder Sheet](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-17-renewal-reminder/) - A small tracker for domain, software, insurance, lease, and service renewal dates. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-17-renewal-reminder.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-17-renewal-reminder.zip
- [Link-in-Bio Audit](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-16-link-in-bio-audit/) - A simple audit sheet for checking whether a public profile points visitors to one useful action. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-16-link-in-bio-audit.html ZIP: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-05-16-link-in-bio-audit.zip
- [Focus Menu Builder](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-05-15-focus-menu/) - A menu of low, medium, and high energy task options for days when planning from scratch is too expensive. ## Machine-Readable Files

- Status: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/status.json
- Catalog JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/catalog.json
- Catalog CSV: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/catalog.csv
- Product Feed JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/product-feed.json
- Product Feed XML: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/product-feed.xml
- Product Feed CSV: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/product-feed.csv
- Support Funnel JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/support-funnel.json
- Support Funnel XML: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/support-funnel.xml
- Support Funnel CSV: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/support-funnel.csv
- Sponsor Kit JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/sponsor-kit.json
- Daily Offer JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/daily-offer.json
- Support Signal JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/support-signal.json
- Checkout Readiness JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/checkout-readiness.json
- Revenue Proof JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/revenue-proof.json
- Topics JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/topics/topics.json
- Offers JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/offers/offers.json
- Use Cases JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/use-cases/use-cases.json
- Templates JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/templates/templates.json
- Guides JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/guides/guides.json
- Store listings JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/imports/store-listings.json
- Store listings CSV: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/imports/store-listings.csv
- JSON Feed: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/feed.json
- RSS: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/feed.xml
- Atom: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/atom.xml
- Sitemap: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/sitemap.xml
